title: Infosys expands strategic collaboration with DNB Bank ASA to modernize financial crime operations
detailed_summary: Infosys announced on June 02, 2026 the expansion of its strategic collaboration with DNB Bank ASA, Norway's largest bank, to modernize DNB's Financial Crime operations using the NICE Actimize X-Sight Enterprise platform. Infosys will act as systems integration partner and help transform DNB's fragmented legacy systems into a unified, intelligence-driven, cloud-native SaaS platform. The work includes enterprise architecture design, platform integration, data migration, and consolidation of customer and payment screening, customer due diligence, transaction monitoring, fraud monitoring, and enterprise case management. No deal value or duration was disclosed.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in AI-first business consulting and technology services, today announced the expansion of its strategic collaboration with DNB Bank ASA (DNB), Norway's largest bank, to modernize its Financial Crime (FinCrime) operations using NICE Actimize X-Sight Enterprise platform.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Expands Strategic Collaboration with DNB Bank ASA to Modernize Financial Crime Operations
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main event, counterparty, and purpose of the collaboration.

important_text_spans.text: As the systems integration partner, Infosys will in collaboration with DNB lead the end-to-end modernization of the bank's FinCrime technology landscape, including enterprise architecture design, platform integration, and data migration.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Expands Strategic Collaboration with DNB Bank ASA to Modernize Financial Crime Operations
important_text_spans.reason: Supports Infosys's role and scope of work in the engagement.

important_text_spans.text: It will consolidate key functions including customer and payment screening, customer due diligence, and transaction and fraud monitoring onto a single, scalable SaaS platform with unified enterprise case management.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Expands Strategic Collaboration with DNB Bank ASA to Modernize Financial Crime Operations
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the operational scope and platform consolidation details.
